title: dbos Witcher gear
description: This resource pack adds equipment of witcher schools from the game Witcher 3
body:
![The Witcher gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/622da80b7cd4af054e496db4ab6b7c5d06a1368a.png)


# Witcher gear CIT pack

This mod is intended to enhance the visual experience of the **modded** or vanilla game.

## List of dependent names **(Armor)**

```
1. Griffin - for iron armor;
> 2. Ursine - for diamond armor;
3. Feline - for chainmail armor;
4. Wolven - for chainmail armor;
5. Manticore - for iron armor.
For sword's u should add ("schools name" silver/steell on the end (works with diamond sword + steel/iron witchers swords from Witcher (More RPG Classes) + diamond claymore from Paladins mod).
```


_The list will be updated depending on the interest in the resource pack. There are plans for two sets of armor from the Netflix series, the Kaer Morhen armor and the Viper armor._

## You can see a comparison of armor from the resource pack with armor from the game below

CIT pack v.1
![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f729034adcf7bb0611157e3b1bb9f8ebbcd82fa1.webp)

Original game
![Armor in original game](https://witcher3guide.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/grandmaster-witcher-gear-01.png?w=1568)

### For a more detailed look at each armor set, head to the gallery
